pi_items.source: Task description (line 5), verifier.py (line 30: INITIAL_TABLE = 3), and export_result.sh
Task description (lines 4-5), verifier.py (line 31: TARGET_TABLE = 7), and export_result.sh
export_result.sh (line 18: DB_PATH variable), setup_task.sh (line 15: DB_DIR references parent directory), and install_floreant.sh (database installation)

privileged_info_summary: The task transfer_table_order@1 operates on Floreant POS 1.4 build 1707b, a real open-source point-of-sale system available on SourceForge. The task requires transferring a table order from Table 3 to Table 7 with a minimum of 2 items. The application uses an embedded Apache Derby database stored at /opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server/posdb. All metadata values (initial_table=3, target_table=7, min_item_count=2, db_path=/opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server/posdb) are correctly specified. The data is synthetic, created fresh for each task execution with a clean database snapshot.
